meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve AI Tool Overload
content.seo_description: Overcome AI tool fatigue with this expert Git workflow. Master Antigravity and Claude Code to streamline your freelance development process.
content.answer_block: Stop juggling fragmented AI tools. By integrating Git as your source of truth and using Antigravity for structured context management alongside Claude Code for terminal-based execution, you create a deterministic, high-velocity coding loop. This methodology eliminates context switching, ensures auditability, and scales your development output for high-ticket client projects.
content.intro:
The modern freelance stack is a graveyard of abandoned AI assistants and disjointed prompts. You’re likely spending more time managing tool context than actually shipping code, leading to 'AI fatigue' and inconsistent project delivery. When every feature request feels like a battle against your own development environment, you aren't just losing time—you're losing your competitive edge.

But what if you treated your AI agents as version-controlled teammates? By tethering your development flow to Git and leveraging CLI-native tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform AI from a chaotic chatbot into a precise, repeatable engineering asset. This is how the top 1% of AI builders ship production-grade code without the cognitive overhead.

steps.title: Contextualize Your Repository
steps.description: Before letting AI loose, define the project boundaries. Antigravity excels at indexing your codebase to prevent hallucinations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Index the current project directory, prioritize the src/ and api/ folders, and generate a 'system_map.md' summarizing the core dependency graph.

steps.title: Branch-Based AI Iteration
steps.description: Never run AI experiments on the main branch. Use atomic feature branches for every AI-generated task to ensure clean pull requests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current feature requirement and suggest a logical naming convention for a new branch that aligns with our existing Git flow.

steps.title: Execute Code Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform the heavy lifting directly in your terminal, keeping you inside your IDE.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a boilerplate for a secure authentication endpoint using the project's existing middleware patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement secure auth endpoint using existing middleware'

steps.title: Automated Code Review
steps.description: Before committing, use AI to audit your changes against the project's style guide and security standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security audit on the modified files in this branch. Look for hardcoded secrets or inefficient database queries.

steps.title: Semantic Versioning & Merge
steps.description: Finalize your work with AI-generated commit messages that explain the 'why' behind the code changes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a conventional commit message based on the recent changes, highlighting the feature impact and technical debt addressed.
steps.claude_code_command: git commit -m 'feat: implement secure auth middleware [AI-generated]'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Rules.md' file in your root; Claude Code respects these constraints during every execution, reducing manual correction.
Use Git hooks to trigger AI-based linting automatically before every push to ensure your AI-generated code meets client standards.
If the AI loses track of context, use 'git reset' to a known-good state and provide a fresh, condensed summary of the current task objective.
Leverage Claude Code's terminal history to identify repetitive patterns in your workflow that can be turned into custom CLI aliases.
Treat your AI prompts as code; store your most effective 'Antigravity' prompt templates in a dedicated /prompts folder within your repo.
content.next_steps: Integrate a CI/CD pipeline that automatically runs your AI-audited code through a suite of unit tests, ensuring that your AI-assisted velocity never compromises production stability.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start building a high-velocity freelance business that clients love. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
